entries.current_position: PF-C01-M01 remains proven with carry-forwards and PF-C01-M02 remains next. Mission #283 selects the 64 GB planning envelope, separate Harmony VM, Atlas VM, and Plex LXC roles, service-specific storage/health/backup/restore, GUI and monitoring independence, and household-first priorities. Capacity remains unmeasured; no deployment, guest, storage, network, backup, migration, cutover, or gate advancement is claimed.
blockers: Apollo is not yet commissioned and proven as the Windows orchestration endpoint.
Windows-specific Codex continuity has not yet been evacuated from Prometheus to Apollo.
The independent Hermes portable command and administration route has not yet received mission evidence.
Windows recovery media, system-image disposition, and manufacturer-driver preservation remain unresolved.
Extended memory testing and bounded stability follow-up remain pending.
entries.next_action: Prepare and execute the exact PF-C01-M02 Preserve the Old Flame work only through a separately bounded authorization; do not infer device renames, migration, Windows removal, Proxmox installation, Plex cutover, Jellyfin deployment, or Gitea activation from this architecture refraction.
entries.next_approval: Jayson must separately authorize endpoint commissioning and migration, then separately authorize any destructive Windows, Proxmox, Plex, Jellyfin, Gitea, or infrastructure action.
